texto: Whatever they have done, or are doing, or will do to the people locked away forever in Guantanamo Bay, they will do the same to the people in Harlem and the people in Los Angeles and the people in Texas and the people in Washington and the people in Florida and of course to the people in Alabama and the people in South Carolina........
explicacao: Citação de Banole sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Whatever they have done, or are doing, or will do to the people locked away forever in Guantanamo…” articula reflexao, justice, people em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
